description: Review Enhancements and Home Screen Stats - SRS level display with animations, polished review completion screen, expandable item details, synonym support, upcoming reviews chart, and learned item counts

userStories.title: Display SRS Level Badge on Review Screens
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see the current SRS level of the item I'm reviewing so that I understand where each item stands in my learning journey.
acceptanceCriteria: SRS level badge displayed on question screen AND answer feedback screen
Badge shows level name: 'Apprentice', 'Guru', 'Master', 'Enlightened', 'Burned'
Badge uses WaniKani colors: Apprentice (#DD0093), Guru (#882D9E), Master (#294DDB), Enlightened (#0093DD), Burned (#434343)
Badge includes appropriate icon (bar/flame style) for each level
Badge positioned consistently in header area
All tests pass
All quality checks pass

userStories.title: Animate SRS Level Up Transitions
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see an animation when an item levels up after my answer so that I get satisfying feedback on my progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Level-up animation: OLD level shown 200ms, badge scales 1.0→1.15 with glow, cross-fade to new level 300ms, particle burst, scale back 1.15→1.0
Total duration ~500ms
Animation only plays when level actually increases
Level change calculated based on WaniKani SRS rules (correct = +1 stage)
Use react-native-reanimated for 60fps animations
All tests pass
All quality checks pass

userStories.title: Animate SRS Level Down Transitions
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a different animation when an item levels down after an incorrect answer.
acceptanceCriteria: Level-down animation: OLD level shown 200ms, badge shakes 2-3 times, red tint pulse, cross-fade to new level 250ms
Total duration ~400ms
Animation only plays when level actually decreases
Level change calculated based on WaniKani SRS rules (incorrect drops based on stage)
Use react-native-reanimated for 60fps animations
All tests pass
All quality checks pass

userStories.title: Create Animated Review Completion Screen Base
userStories.description: As a user, I want the review completion screen to feel polished so that finishing reviews feels rewarding.
acceptanceCriteria: Success checkmark icon in colored circle (reviews purple) with scale bounce animation (0→1.1→1.0)
Checkmark draws itself with stroke animation as it appears
Total items reviewed in large bold text (64px)
Incorrect count in secondary text with red tint if any incorrect
Sync status badge with colored background (green 'Synced' / amber 'Queued')
Styled 'Return to Dashboard' button
Layout matches LessonCompletion component patterns
All tests pass
All quality checks pass

userStories.title: Add Staggered Entrance Animation to Review Completion
userStories.description: As a user, I want elements on the completion screen to appear with staggered timing for a polished feel.
acceptanceCriteria: Elements appear with 100ms staggered delays: checkmark → items count → incorrect count → sync status → button
Each element fades in and slides up from below
If 0 incorrect: confetti particles burst from checkmark
Respects device reduced motion settings
All tests pass
All quality checks pass
Verify in browser/simulator using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add Toggle for Full Item Details on Incorrect Screen
userStories.description: As a user, when I get an answer wrong, I want the option to see all information about that item.
acceptanceCriteria: Toggle button with chevron: 'Show full details' (down) / 'Hide details' (up)
Chevron rotates 180° smoothly on toggle (200ms ease-out)
Content reveals with height animation (250ms ease-out-quart)
Default state is collapsed
Toggle state resets for each new incorrect answer
All tests pass
All quality checks pass

userStories.title: Display Full Item Details Content When Expanded
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see organized sections with all item information when I expand the details.
acceptanceCriteria: Meanings section: all meanings (primary bolded, alternatives regular)
Readings section: all readings with types (on'yomi, kun'yomi, etc.)
Meaning Mnemonic section with formatted text
Reading Mnemonic section (if applicable)
Components section: radicals (for kanji) or kanji (for vocabulary)
Sections have subtle dividers and consistent spacing
All tests pass
All quality checks pass
Verify in browser/simulator using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create Pending Synonyms Storage
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to store synonyms locally and track pending syncs so that synonyms work offline.
acceptanceCriteria: Create user_synonyms table (subject_id, synonym, synced_at, created_at)
Create pending_synonyms table (subject_id, synonym, created_at)
Add database functions: addUserSynonym(), getPendingSynonyms(), markSynonymSynced()
Answer validation checks user_synonyms table in addition to API meanings
All tests pass
All quality checks pass

userStories.title: Add Synonym from Incorrect Answer Screen
userStories.description: As a user, when my answer is marked incorrect but I believe it should be accepted, I want to add it as a synonym.
acceptanceCriteria: 'Add as Synonym' text link appears on MEANING questions only
Link is visually de-emphasized: smaller font, below primary actions
Tap shows 'Adding...' with pulse, then 'Synonym added ✓'
After 400ms, auto-marks question correct and advances
Synonym saved to local database
If offline, synonym queued in pending_synonyms table
All tests pass
All quality checks pass

userStories.title: Sync Synonyms to WaniKani
userStories.description: As a user, I want my custom synonyms to sync to WaniKani so they're available across all my devices.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement WaniKani Study Materials API: GET study materials, POST/PUT meaning_synonyms
On app startup or manual sync, push pending synonyms
Handle API errors with retry logic
Remove from pending_synonyms and update synced_at on success
All tests pass
All quality checks pass

userStories.title: Query Learned Item Counts
userStories.description: As a developer, I need database queries to count learned kanji and vocabulary.
acceptanceCriteria: Create getLearnedCount(subjectType: 'kanji' | 'vocabulary'): number
Query counts assignments where srs_stage >= 5 (Guru or above)
Vocabulary count includes both 'vocabulary' and 'kana_vocabulary' types
Query uses appropriate indexes for efficiency
All tests pass
All quality checks pass

userStories.title: Add Learned Counts to Home Screen
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see how many kanji and vocabulary items I've learned so I can track my overall progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Display 'Kanji Learned: X' and 'Vocabulary Learned: X' on home screen
Counts animate from 0 to actual number (500ms, ease-out)
Stats displayed in visually consistent row/grid with existing elements
Counts update when returning to home screen after reviews/lessons
All tests pass
All quality checks pass
Verify in browser/simulator using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Query Upcoming Reviews by Hour
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a database query that groups upcoming reviews by hour for the chart.
acceptanceCriteria: Create getUpcomingReviewsByHour(hours: number): { hour: Date, count: number }[]
Groups assignments by available_at into hourly buckets
Only includes assignments where started_at is not null and srs_stage > 0 and < 9
Returns array of 12 objects with hour timestamp and review count
Hours with 0 reviews included for chart continuity
All tests pass
All quality checks pass

userStories.title: Display Upcoming Reviews Bar Chart
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a chart showing how many reviews are coming up in the next 12 hours.
acceptanceCriteria: Bar chart displayed on home screen below main stats
12 bars, one per hour, showing NEW reviews per hour (not cumulative)
Bars colored reviews purple (#AA00FF) with subtle gradient
Hour labels below bars (e.g., '2pm', '3pm')
Current hour highlighted with accent border
Chart height constrained to ~100-120px
All tests pass
All quality checks pass

userStories.title: Add Chart Animations and Interactions
userStories.description: As a user, I want the chart to animate and respond to taps for a polished experience.
acceptanceCriteria: Bars grow from bottom with staggered timing (50ms delay each, left to right)
On bar tap: show tooltip with exact count ('15 reviews at 3pm')
If 0 reviews in next 12 hours: show empty state with friendly message
Empty state shows when next review IS (e.g., 'Next review in 2 days')
Respects reduced motion settings
All tests pass
All quality checks pass
Verify in browser/simulator using dev-browser skill
